title: Gallacetophenone lsonicotinoyl Hydrazone (GAPINH) as an Analytical Reagent for the Determination of Aluminium(lll)
author: K. RAJA REDDY
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Regional Engineering College, Warangal-506 004 

  Manuscript received 5 April 1982, revised 13 April 1983, accepted 24 June 1983  

 Aluminium(III) forms an yellow coloured soluble complex with gallacetophenone isonicotinoyl hydrazone at  p H 4.0. Beer's law is obeyed upto 1.90 ppm of aluminium(Ill) at 405 nm. The effect of pH, reagent concentration and diverse ions have been studied. The stability constant of the complex Is 7.41 x 10 5 . The molar absorptivity and Sandell sensitivity are 1.07 x 10 4  lit.mole -1 .cm -1  and 0.0025  µ g.cm -2 , respectively. The proportional decrease In the colour of the complex on gradual addition of fluoride or oxalate has been utilised for indirect determination of fluoride or oxalate In micro· gram quantities.
